use_cases: Call-to-action button with animated glow effects for dark-themed interfaces
Interactive button component for landing pages and marketing sites
Premium-feeling button with pulsing color animation for product showcases
Versatile button with customizable glow color for brand-consistent UI
Animated button element for hero sections and feature highlights
ai_summary: A dark-themed button component featuring dual animated glow effects using radial and conic gradients. The button has a gradient background with pulsing and sliding color animations that create a cosmic glow effect. Fully polymorphic with customizable color, speed, and polymorphic as prop for rendering as different elements.
